templates.name: When do the points expire?
templates.content: Points expire after a year of not making a purchase.

templates.name: Military / first responder / medical / teacher / student discount
templates.content: Thank you for your service! You can learn more and apply for your discount here: https://liverpoolstyle.com/pages/essential-workers

templates.name: Wholesale inquiries
templates.content: For wholesale inquiries please email us at wholesale@liverpoolstyle.com. Our team is happy to chat!

templates.name: How to redeem points
templates.content: Happy to help! To redeem your points, be sure to sign into your Shop account on our site. Select "Redeem Points" and select the amount of points you would like to redeem. You will be issued a custom code that you can copy and paste into the discount bar during check out. Please note only one code can be used.

templates.name: Do you ship to P.O. Boxes?
templates.content: We can't ship to P.O. Box addresses at this time, though it's definitely something we hope to do in the future!

templates.name: Social Media
templates.content: Give us a follow on IG: https://www.instagram.com/liverpooljeans/ and FB here: https://www.facebook.com/liverpooljeans

templates.name: Store location / retailer
templates.content: Like our customers, our retailer partners are a big part of our family! You can find us at a store near you here: https://liverpooljeans.com/pages/store-locator

templates.name: Do you offer exchanges?
templates.content: At this time, we only accept exchanges for different sizes of the same style and color. To exchange an item, please return the item you wish to exchange using the complimentary return label provided to you when you process a return on our website. If you mark the return as an exchange, you will be prompted to select a different size. Send the pair you want to return and your exchange order will ship out once you have shipped your return to us. To process an exchange for a different style or color, please submit a return here: https://liverpool.loopreturns.com/#/

templates.name: Return Policy
templates.content: You can check out our detailed return policy here - https://liverpooljeans.com/pages/returns

templates.name: Weekend Escalations
templates.content: The team isn't in the office during weekends, though we'll do what we can to get back in touch asap once usual business hours resume on Monday.

templates.name: Where are your items made / manufactured?
templates.content: Our products are made in a few places. If you can tell me which one you're looking at specifically, I'd be more than happy to check on this for you.

templates.name: Will I be charged when I choose TryNow?
templates.content: Unfortunatley, we no longer are using the the TryNow program.

templates.name: Shipping time
templates.content: Our processing time takes 3-5 business days and we ship via FedEx. Once shipped, it will take 3-5 business days for domestic orders, approximately 6-10 business days in total. Please keep in mind that shipping times are based on zip codes as well.

templates.name: Is there any discount?
templates.content: We currently only have discounts available for first time customers.

templates.name: Rewards / referral
templates.content: We have a Loyalist program where you can earn points to redeem on future purchases. Check it out here - https://liverpooljeans.com/pages/the-loyalist

templates.name: Restock button (autosend enabled)
templates.content: I currently don't have the exact date of a possible restock, but I recommend signing up on the product page so you're notified the second it comes back in!

templates.name: Sizing
templates.content: Happy to help you find the right size! Our products generally run true to size. Would you mind sharing your usual size? You can also check out our size chart here: https://liverpooljeans.com/pages/size-chart

templates.name: Free Shipping
templates.content: We offer free ground shipping and returns on orders over $175. Please note that this offer isn't valid for orders to Hawaii, Alaska, Puerto Rico, and the Virgin Islands.

templates.name: Brand ambassador / sponsorship
templates.content: The best way to discuss this is to email us directly at hello@liverpoolstyle.com. Our team is happy to chat.

templates.name: When is the last date to order for Christmas delivery?
templates.content: Orders would need to be placed by December 12th in order to receive your package by Christmas.

templates.name: Phone Support
templates.content: You can give us a call at 201-503-3311 Monday-Friday, 9 am-5 pm PST, or let me know if I can help via text, it may be faster.

templates.name: Do you offer expedited shipping?
templates.content: We do, however at this moment we currently do not have it available. We are actively working to get it back on and when we do we offer 2-day expedited shipping for $16 through FedEx.

templates.name: When will I receive my refund? / How long does it take to process refunds?
templates.content: Transit time back to the warehouse may take up to 7-10 business days, and you'll receive an e-mail once your return has been received and processed. Once your return is approved, you'll receive a confirmation. Please allow up to 2 weeks for your refund to appear on your bank account (depending on your financial institution).

templates.name: Customer Support
templates.content: The best way to handle this is to email us directly at hello@liverpoolstyle.com or give us a call at 201-503-3311 Monday-Friday, 9 am-5 pm PST. Our team is happy to help!

templates.name: How do I return a Gift?
templates.content: Please start your return at the following link: https://liverpool.loop.gift/#/gift-receipt Let me know if any questions come up!

templates.name: Cancel/Edit order
templates.content: In an effort to ship your order as quickly as possible, we cannot cancel or edit an order once it is placed. We offer free returns/exchange should you need to return or exchange an item. You could go to this link https://liverpool.loopreturns.com/#/ if you need to process a return or exchange.

templates.name: Order Status/ Tracking
templates.content: The best way to find the most up to date status of your order is by visiting: https://liverpoolstyle.com/pages/help-center#status

templates.name: Size Chart: All - Clothes
templates.content: You can take a look at our size chart here: https://liverpoolstyle.com/pages/size-chart

templates.name: Sales Collection
templates.content: You can take a look at our sale collection here: https://liverpoolstyle.com/collections/end-of-season-sale
